1101.reason: A robot voted negatively on a label

subject: LU-19365 tests: use nidmask in 72e for ipv6 support

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

parents.subject: LU-19488 tests: FORCE_LARGE_NID on remote env

commit.subject: LU-19365 tests: use nidmask in 72e for ipv6 support
commit.message:
LU-19365 tests: use nidmask in 72e for ipv6 support

Use nidmask for nodemap ranges as they are IPV6 friendly. This
test was failing for IPv6 case and this change will use nidmask
which will allow us to use more ipv6 nids in range.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec env=ONLY=72e env=FORCE_LARGE_NID=true,LOAD_MODULES_REMOTE=true
Signed-off-by: Manish Regmi <mregmi@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ie3d2332ed91d90095f40cb5ed13140983aab41e1
